definition: Bins on cobertura (fraction of tall-grass pixels in the roadside region).
calibration_method: Midpoint between linearly separable class clusters (see verdia_ml.labels.calibrate_cobertura_thresholds).
notes: Fixtures are synthetic DNIT stand-ins for the offline-eval seam. Recalibrate on a hand-relabeled DNIT vegetation split when available. Values are fractions in [0, 1].
